content:
⸻

🔄 Higher-Order Concern 2: Organization & Flow

Overall, the structure of your essay [flows well / could be improved]. Each paragraph [does/doesn’t] clearly connect back to the thesis. I noticed your transitions between [Paragraph X] and [Paragraph Y] felt [smooth/choppy/unclear]. You could try using transition phrases like “[suggestion]” to help the reader follow your comparison more easily.

⸻

📚 Higher-Order Concern 3: Evidence & Support

In terms of support, your example in Paragraph [#] was [effective/confusing] because [reason]. I appreciated the comparison between [Subject A and B], but I think adding more detail or explanation would make the point stronger. You might also include a source or statistic to back it up if relevant.

⸻

✏️ Optional: Lower-Order Concerns (Grammar, Clarity, APA)

I noticed a few grammar or clarity issues in places. For instance, in Paragraph [#], the sentence “[insert sentence]” was a bit confusing—I recommend breaking it into two shorter sentences.
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 3 (chunk 3/11)
